company_pools.notes: Internship company. Keep scope explicitly team-contributed and avoid multiplying independent project universes.

projects.business_domain: Security knowledge retrieval and analyst tooling
projects.project_goal: Reduce manual context gathering for policy and incident investigations through retrieval-assisted internal tooling.
projects.scope_ceiling: Feature delivery inside a team-maintained retrieval assistant, evaluator, or analyst console; not end-to-end ownership of a standalone platform.
projects.ownership_ceiling: Implement handlers, evaluators, ingestion utilities, replay hooks, lightweight UI surfaces, and deployment checks for a bounded intern-owned slice.
projects.notes: Use for retrieval assistant, policy search, evaluation, or analyst-console variants. The business logic stays anchored in security knowledge retrieval.

projects.business_domain: Security telemetry replay, release safety, and validation
projects.project_goal: Improve release confidence and replay fidelity for security event-processing and retrieval-adjacent services.
projects.scope_ceiling: Tooling and reliability work around existing services, replay sandboxes, CI gates, and device/parser validation; not ownership of the core product roadmap.
projects.ownership_ceiling: Implement parsers, replay fixtures, CI/CD gates, deployment automation, Linux validation harnesses, and bounded reliability fixes with teammate guidance.
projects.notes: Use for replay sandbox, release hardening, device-feed validation, or regression-gating variants without changing the underlying security-platform context.

company_pools.notes: Longer tenure allows multiple sequential projects, but their time windows must not overlap or read like unrelated parallel careers.

projects.business_domain: Merchant incident triage, support routing, and exception handling
projects.project_goal: Replace spreadsheet-heavy merchant support workflows with auditable services and operator tooling.
projects.scope_ceiling: Cross-functional delivery of internal support tooling, routing APIs, and dashboards used by regional operations; not sole ownership of the full merchant platform.
projects.ownership_ceiling: Translate analyst requirements, build validation scripts and service slices, coordinate release checks, and ship operator-facing views with backend/frontend partners.
projects.notes: Use for merchant incident console, exception workbench, refund-resolution workflow, or issue-routing variants.

projects.business_domain: Pricing, dispatch rules, and promotion eligibility services
projects.project_goal: Move frequently changed pricing and dispatch logic from analyst-managed processes into release-managed backend services.
projects.scope_ceiling: Service migration, rule validation, release-readiness checks, and ops tooling for pricing/dispatch workflows; not ownership of company-wide pricing strategy.
projects.ownership_ceiling: Build backfills, rule validators, microservice modules, data parity checks, and rollout coordination with backend and ops partners.
projects.notes: Use for merchant offer rules, pricing rules migration, dispatch rules service, or rule-evaluation service variants.

projects.business_domain: Courier ETA, supply-demand planning, and anomaly monitoring
projects.project_goal: Improve city-level planning speed and operational visibility through reusable ETA and supply monitoring services.
projects.scope_ceiling: Internal feature services and planning workflows for ops teams, backed by ETL and event-driven updates; not a standalone customer-facing product.
projects.ownership_ceiling: Build feature pipelines, anomaly checks, service adapters, cached reads, and planning diagnostics with partner engineering teams.
projects.notes: Use for courier ETA feature service, capacity planning service, merchant supply exception monitoring, or outage diagnostics.

projects.business_domain: Campaign launch tooling, experimentation, and promotion audits
projects.project_goal: Give operators a shared console to configure, launch, and audit promotion campaigns with fewer errors.
projects.scope_ceiling: Internal launch-console and experimentation workflows tied to existing backend services and data refresh jobs; not ownership of company-wide growth product strategy.
projects.ownership_ceiling: Build validation logic, console flows, sync jobs, audit tables, and release coordination with product/frontend/backend partners.
projects.notes: Use for campaign operations console, regional promotion console, or experiment-setup workflow variants.

company_pools.notes: Shorter tenure. Keep Temu scoped to analytics and experimentation support rather than turning it into a large standalone engineering program.

projects.business_domain: Checkout funnel, assortment, and conversion diagnostics
projects.project_goal: Identify conversion friction and prioritize product fixes through repeatable diagnostics and experiment readouts.
projects.scope_ceiling: Analytics workflows, readouts, and lightweight modeling for product and R&D reviews; not ownership of the core product roadmap.
projects.ownership_ceiling: Build SQL/Hive/Spark analyses, notebooks, and experiment slices that inform product decisions and monitoring.
projects.notes: Use for checkout funnel, conversion diagnostics, retention slices, or experiment-readout variants.

projects.business_domain: Merchant reporting, promotion monitoring, and recurring analytics automation
projects.project_goal: Reduce repetitive reporting and improve visibility for merchant performance and promotion operations.
projects.scope_ceiling: Recurring analytics automation, anomaly checks, and lightweight modeling; not full-stack product development.
projects.ownership_ceiling: Automate reports, reconcile datasets, build monitoring tables, and provide decision support for experiments and merchant reviews.
projects.notes: Use for reporting automation, merchant quality reviews, promotion monitoring, or cohort-analysis variants.
